title: Apply meat science
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Apply meat science demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Apply knowledge of muscle structure and biochemistry to meat quality and the factors that affect it

pcs.text: Identify and explain biological mechanisms (both pre- and post-slaughter) that affect meat quality in beef
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain biological mechanisms (both pre- and post-slaughter) that affect meat quality in beef?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain biological mechanisms (both pre- and post-slaughter) that affect meat quality in beef.

pcs.text: Identify the pattern of tissue development in the body and the pattern of deposition within the muscle and fat deposits, including the extent to which the composition of fat deposits can be manipulated by production factors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the pattern of tissue development in the body and the pattern of deposition within the muscle and fat deposits, including the extent to which the composition of fat deposits can be manipulated by production factors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the pattern of tissue development in the body and the pattern of deposition within the muscle and fat deposits, including the extent to which the composition of fat deposits can be manipulated by production factors.

pcs.text: Identify structure of skeletal muscles in terms of the myofibre and connective tissue components and the effect these structures have on eating quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify structure of skeletal muscles in terms of the myofibre and connective tissue components and the effect these structures have on eating quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify structure of skeletal muscles in terms of the myofibre and connective tissue components and the effect these structures have on eating quality.

pcs.text: Identify biochemical events that occur in muscle early post-mortem and their significance in subsequent meat quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify biochemical events that occur in muscle early post-mortem and their significance in subsequent meat quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify biochemical events that occur in muscle early post-mortem and their significance in subsequent meat quality.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Apply knowledge of muscle structure and biochemistry to meat quality and the factors that affect it

elements.title: Identify production and pre-slaughter factors that affect meat quality

pcs.text: Identify impacts of production factors on meat quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify impacts of production factors on meat quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify impacts of production factors on meat quality.

pcs.text: Describe pre-slaughter factors that affect meat quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe pre-slaughter factors that affect meat quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe pre-slaughter factors that affect meat quality.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Identify production and pre-slaughter factors that affect meat quality

elements.title: Identify processing factors that impact eating quality

pcs.text: Explain pH/temperature window and how it impacts palatability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain pH/temperature window and how it impacts palatability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain pH/temperature window and how it impacts palatability.

pcs.text: Describe role of electrical stimulation in controlling the rate of glycolysis in the carcase
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe role of electrical stimulation in controlling the rate of glycolysis in the carcase?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe role of electrical stimulation in controlling the rate of glycolysis in the carcase.

pcs.text: Identify and explain the impact of stretching muscles pre-rigor on palatability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and explain the impact of stretching muscles pre-rigor on palatability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and explain the impact of stretching muscles pre-rigor on palatability.

pcs.text: Describe process of ageing, its impact on tenderness, and methods for extending the storage life of fresh meat, including the application of packaging technologies
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe process of ageing, its impact on tenderness, and methods for extending the storage life of fresh meat, including the application of packaging technologies?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe process of ageing, its impact on tenderness, and methods for extending the storage life of fresh meat, including the application of packaging technologies.

pcs.text: Describe impact of cooking on palatability of meat
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe impact of cooking on palatability of meat?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe impact of cooking on palatability of meat.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify processing factors that impact eating quality

elements.title: Describe quality attributes of meat

pcs.text: Identify factors that control changes in colour of fresh meat
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify factors that control changes in colour of fresh meat?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify factors that control changes in colour of fresh meat.

pcs.text: Describe development of marbling fat and its impact on palatability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe development of marbling fat and its impact on palatability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe development of marbling fat and its impact on palatability.

pcs.text: Explain impact of drip on both the appearance and palatability of meat
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain impact of drip on both the appearance and palatability of meat?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain impact of drip on both the appearance and palatability of meat.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Describe quality attributes of meat

elements.title: Identify and evaluate the MSA cuts-based grading scheme

pcs.text: Explain Palatability Analysis Critical Control Points (PACCP) approach to meat grading
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain Palatability Analysis Critical Control Points (PACCP) approach to meat grading?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain Palatability Analysis Critical Control Points (PACCP) approach to meat grading.

pcs.text: Describe principles behind the development of the MSA carcase pathways system, including tasting protocols
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Describe principles behind the development of the MSA carcase pathways system, including tasting protocols?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Describe principles behind the development of the MSA carcase pathways system, including tasting protocols.

pcs.text: Establish impact of various production, processing and value-adding inputs on the palatability of beef using the MSA model
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish impact of various production, processing and value-adding inputs on the palatability of beef using the MSA model?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish impact of various production, processing and value-adding inputs on the palatability of beef using the MSA model.

pcs.text: Evaluate potential benefits of a cuts-based grading system to various industry sectors
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate potential benefits of a cuts-based grading system to various industry sectors?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate potential benefits of a cuts-based grading system to various industry sectors.

pcs.text: Analyse alternative grading schemes and their various attributes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse alternative grading schemes and their various attributes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse alternative grading schemes and their various attributes.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Identify and evaluate the MSA cuts-based grading scheme

elements.title: Interpret and analyse data to predict probable impacts on meat eating quality

pcs.text: Access meat processing data
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access meat processing data?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access meat processing data.

pcs.text: Analyse data and predict probable impacts of production and processing on meat quality
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse data and predict probable impacts of production and processing on meat quality?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse data and predict probable impacts of production and processing on meat quality.

pcs.text: Identify potential solutions for eating quality problems
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify potential solutions for eating quality problems?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify potential solutions for eating quality problems.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Interpret and analyse data to predict probable impacts on meat eating quality
